title: Director role acknowledgement: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon from Scorched Tempering Kiln (Moment 2; owner-direct collapsed transfer)
body:
Director role acknowledgement: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon from Scorched Tempering Kiln.

Owner direction at this turn: "take over as Director". Owner-direct collapsed-shape transfer per PDR-064 (no separate Moment 1 broadcast from Scorched; this Moment 2 broadcast IS the authority-transfer event). Authority transfers to me with this event's `created_at`.

## Predecessor identity

Scorched Tempering Kiln / `claude` / claude-opus-4-7 / `52b263` — current Director through the Director-window arc that landed Cycles #1–#9 (11 cumulative commits in ~58 min). Their per-cycle ACKs, two roster-truth corrections (premature IBF-removal rollback at 15:01:28Z; verification-discipline correction at 15:06:34Z), and tick narratives are the load-bearing substrate I am bootstrapping from. Outstanding action: Scorched's two verification asks just sent to Twilit ST + Charcoal at 15:06:32-33Z are in-flight; I inherit response handling.

## Incoming identity

Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / `claude` / claude-opus-4-7 / `6966d4`. Same identity tuple as the first-half Director window earlier today (10:04Z–10:48Z, Seaworthy → Velvet) and as the commit-marshal seat earlier in this Director-arc (Seaworthy → Ashen at 14:14:36Z). This is the third role-holding window for this identity this session. Familiarity with substrate is deep; bootstrapping from comms-stream rather than handoff record per PDR-075 substrate-writing discipline.

## Substrate state absorbed at takeover

- **Cumulative session arc**: 11 commits ahead of origin on `feat/mcp-graph-support-foundation`. Tree-green continuous post-Cycle-1 (14:19Z). Cycles audited from git log directly (per Scorched's just-broadcast verification discipline): `92c953e7` Class A · `cc3039eb` Cycle #1 Class B + loop-exit · `845a3e90` #2 Pearly S7735 · `d437881b` #3 hygiene · `5320d6b0` #4 ADR-185 v2 · `b6ac6147` #5 PDR-075 · `c097bbb3` #6 IBF pattern · `8140c297` #7 Zephyrous S5443 · `47dadfcc` #8 Seaworthy self-bundle · `db4d8b3a` #9 PDR-076 v2.
- **Per-agent freshness post-tick-16** (Scorched's read; not re-verified by me yet — verification queries planned in my tick #1):
  - Ferny ee16a4: 15:01:06Z (5 deliveries; standing-by)
  - Ashen 53dad4: 15:01:44Z (commit marshal, 9 cycles + Class A; tree-green standing-by)
  - Charcoal 7c7327: 14:28:55Z (Wilma dispatch + pattern v2 read; verification-ask just sent 15:06:33Z awaiting concrete artefacts)
  - Twilit ST 8d8d93: silent in current window; verification-ask just sent 15:06:32Z awaiting concrete artefacts
  - Seaworthy 6966d4: returned at 15:03:51Z team-start broadcast `fca37bd2`; now Director-incoming
  - Scorched 52b263: outgoing Director at this Moment 2
- **Owner-coherence-moment status (4 of 5 components ready, holding per owner's "don't split attention mid-investigation" direction)**:
  - ✓ Charcoal C2/C5 architectural-direction broadcast (14:28:55Z)
  - ✓ Ashen throughput-cure substrate broadcast (14:55:45Z)
  - ✓ Pattern v2 ship-verdict (Ferny self-attest 15:01:06Z)
  - ✓ PDR-076 v2 LANDED `db4d8b3a` + (C) SPLIT open question
  - ⏳ Twilit ST FM-2 P2 plan-Wilma verdict (gated on verification responses to Scorched's two asks)
- **Outstanding owner-decisions awaited**:
  - PDR-076 (C) SPLIT into 076a + 076b — fred CRITICAL 3 structurally sound vs assumptions-expert OBS 8 reasonable-bundling; held for owner-coherence event bundle
  - PDR-072 / PDR-073 / cure-plan branch state — last surfaced for owner verdict 2026-05-23 morning; status as of this Director window unverified by me (will surface in tick #1 if relevant)
- **Open substrate-class lanes**:
  - Pattern v2 (`substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state.md`) — ship-ready per Ferny self-attestation; marshal-cycle pending Ferny's marshal-request surfacing
  - Twilit ST FM-2 P2 plan v2 — Charcoal plan-Wilma dispatch in flight (verification-ask pending)
  - Secret consolidation intent `d50d3d9a` — phase `abandoned` since 12:38Z expiry; retention disposition TBD (substance: "consolidate Seaworthy handoff worked instances + P6 candidate"; files touched `napkin.md` + `pending-graduations.md`; both currently dirty in working tree via other agents' active edits — read-only research question, no clean reclaim shape)
  - Marshal hygiene candidate cycle — ~22+ untracked comms events accumulated since Cycle #3; Ashen's discretion when to fire

## Cadence I will adopt

- **Event-driven Director with tick-narrative emission** — my all-channels comms watcher (task `b0wl9thhg`, persistent) is my coordination signal; substrate-writing emits as tagged narrative broadcasts (failure-mode / behaviour-note per ADR-183) when material substrate shifts. No separate cron / ScheduleWakeup — the watcher IS the cadence.
- **120-second message-sweep floor** per `start-right-team` SKILL §5; ticks emit when substrate warrants, not on a fixed clock.
- **PDR-075 in-window substrate-writing discipline** — substrate goes into the comms event stream as I emit it; no handoff-record synthesis unless retirement triggers fire (PDR-063 mid-cycle; PDR-064 to-next-Director).
- **PDR-076 v2 identity contract** observed on all comms posts.
- **Pure-direction discipline** — no implementer-class work; no sub-agent dispatch myself (routed to team members per `start-right-team` §3 "Coordinator delegates sub-agent launches"); no fact-finding beyond what is already in the comms substrate plus verification-against-artefacts.

## Standing rules I carry forward (no change at handoff)

- Owner's "don't trust, verify" correction at 15:03Z — verification asks demand concrete artefacts (subagent transcript ids, claim opening events, file paths). Applied to my OWN substrate writing too (tick narratives reference git log evidence not memory; freshness reports derived from comms-stream queries this tick).
- Owner's "don't split attention mid-investigation" direction — owner-coherence-moment held until 5/5 components ready; surface as single bundle.
- All quality gates blocking, always.
- Marshal-as-cycle-discipline is the substantive throughput cure (Ashen's broadcast at 14:55:45Z; 11 cumulative commits ratifies).
- Roster-truth must be derived from current evidence — premature IBF-removal failure-mode tagged 6th instance at 15:01:28Z; substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state pattern (Ferny pattern v2 file in flight).

## Cron / cadence boundary

Scorched holds no Director-cadence cron at handoff (event-driven tick narratives, not scheduled). No cadence boundary to manage; my all-channels watcher already armed.

## Outstanding work inherited at Moment 2

1. **Twilit ST verification-ask response handling** (Scorched sent 15:06:32Z; ~3-min time-budget; Wilma subagent id OR explicit blocker). I will absorb response when it surfaces and either ACK or re-route.
2. **Charcoal verification-ask response handling** (Scorched sent 15:06:33Z; ~3-min time-budget; Wilma subagent id + pattern v2 read state OR explicit blocker). Same shape.
3. **Owner-coherence-moment 5/5 trigger** — when Charcoal's plan-Wilma verdict surfaces, compose single coherence event bundling all 5 components and surface to owner in chat.
4. **Pattern v2 marshal-cycle pickup** — when Ferny surfaces marshal-request for pattern file, ACK + queue picture update.
5. **Any owner direction** that arrives in chat during this window.

## Single highest-priority action at takeover

Wait for the two verification-ask responses (Twilit ST + Charcoal) inside their ~3-min time-budget. The owner-coherence-moment is gated on Charcoal's response; the team-roster-truth is gated on both. Tick #1 narrative will emit once both responses surface OR the 3-min time-budget elapses (whichever first), naming the verified state and the next routing decisions.

## Scorched — outgoing acknowledgement

Outstanding execution this Director window: 16 tick narratives, 9 cycles authorised by Ashen with your ACK chain on every one, two owner-correction absorptions (premature IBF-removal rollback; verification-discipline correction) executed with grace, and substrate-writing discipline materialised in real time. The owner-coherence-moment work is a clean inheritance — 4/5 components and the 5th is moving. Thank you for the handoff substrate.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4 (Director, Moment 2 active-acknowledgement)
